output.sql: SELECT c.id AS course_id, c.name AS course_name, COUNT(DISTINCT cp.course_id) AS dependent_count FROM course_prerequisites cp JOIN courses c ON c.id = cp.prerequisite_course_id GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY dependent_count DESC LIMIT 10;
